SVG is missing accessible name

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Aktuelt</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile"> <ul aria-multiselectable="true" class="vertical menu accordion-menu menulevel0" data-accordion-menu="8y9s63-accordion-menu" data-submenu-toggle="true" id="mainmenu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation" id="navigation"> <ul aria-busy="true" class="navigation dropdown align-center menulevel0" data-dropdown-menu="86ptmz-dropdown-menu" id="mainmenu" role="menubar"> <li class
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="link" href="/fastfrosset-avfall.6737873-602591.html">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til nyhetsarkivet'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>

CRITICAL

<input class="outside-me" id="soke-privat-search-for" placeholder="Skriv inn hva du vil sortere og vi forteller deg hvordan" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/f0fb1c1d-1def-441c-a64a-53e483ba5c56
Avvik: 3 | Bestått: 23
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilerikstemmen.no'

<a href="https://www.erikstemmen.no/"><span>Gå til <span class="application">erikstemmen.no</span></span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilIRS MILJØ IKS'

<a href="https://www.erikstemmen.no"><span>Gå til <span class="organization">IRS MILJØ IKS</span></span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.erikstemmen.no/">https://www.erikstemmen.no/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile"> <ul aria-multiselectable="true" class="vertical menu accordion-menu menulevel0" data-accordion-menu="deobky-accordion-menu" data-submenu-toggle="true" id="mainmenu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation" id="navigation"> <ul aria-busy="true" class="navigation dropdown align-center menulevel0" data-dropdown-menu="ye0l0p-dropdown-menu" id="mainmenu" role="menubar"> <li class
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Relaterte sider</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile"> <ul aria-multiselectable="true" class="vertical menu accordion-menu menulevel0" data-accordion-menu="xyitdw-accordion-menu" data-submenu-toggle="true" id="mainmenu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation" id="navigation"> <ul aria-busy="true" class="navigation dropdown align-center menulevel0" data-dropdown-menu="t7zy57-dropdown-menu" id="mainmenu" role="menubar"> <li class
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menuitem menulevel1 newwindow" data-cat="622414" href="/vis-brosjyre.622414.no.html" id="minimenumobileamenuitem622414" target="_blank">Vis brosjyre</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.erikstemmen.no%2Fbestilling-av-slamtoemming.602772.no.html" onclick="retur
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="LinkedIn" class="toollink shareonlink linkedin" href="#" onclick="lns_click(); return false;"> <svg height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/200
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Returpunkter m/kartreferanser - IRS Miljø

https://www.erikstemmen.no/returpunkter-mkartreferanser.602758.no.html
Avvik: 166 | Bestått: 422
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menuitem menulevel1 newwindow" data-cat="622414" href="/vis-brosjyre.622414.no.html" id="minimenumobileamenuitem622414" target="_blank">Vis brosjyre</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menuitem menulevel1 newwindow" data-cat="622414" href="/vis-brosjyre.622414.no.html" id="minimenuamenuitem622414" target="_blank">Vis brosjyre</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menuitem menulevel1 newwindow" data-cat="602796" href="/tilgjengelighetserklaering.602796.no.html" id="bunnmenyamenuitem602796" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile"> <ul aria-multiselectable="true" class="vertical menu accordion-menu menulevel0" data-accordion-menu="syv8fa-accordion-menu" data-submenu-toggle="true" id="mainmenu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation" id="navigation"> <ul aria-busy="true" class="navigation dropdown align-center menulevel0" data-dropdown-menu="8o41le-dropdown-menu" id="mainmenu" role="menubar"> <li class

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.com/svgjs" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><g transform="matrix(0.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk" type="text" value=""/>
